title: API: GET /api/style-profiles (presets + customs list)

task.description: Implement GET /api/style-profiles to return exactly two buckets: system presets (readable by any authenticated user) and the caller’s custom profiles. Return only summary fields in camelCase and enforce auth.
acceptance_criteria: Unauthenticated GET /api/style-profiles returns 401 with JSON containing error.code.
Authenticated GET /api/style-profiles returns 200 and body.presets.length===2 on a fresh DB.
Returned objects are camelCase and include only summary fields (id, name, isSystemPreset, createdAt, updatedAt).
Customs list contains only rows where userId matches the session user id (no cross-user rows).

definition_of_done: Route uses shared auth helper and model list function.
System presets are included even when caller has no customs.
